body: Kyle just texted — he's driving up from Gainesville this weekend. Should I grab tickets to the Jumbo Shrimp game Saturday? Figure he'd get a kick out of the ballpark.
Yes! Get 3, I'll skip the tennis match Sunday to cook. Is Ravi still coming over or did that fall through?
Ravi's out, Sarah might stop by after her shift at Baptist. I'll grab the tickets now between cases. Back-to-back caths this afternoon so don't expect me before 7.
Got it. I'll do the low-sodium shrimp tacos so don't worry about stopping anywhere. Tell Sarah to come hungry 🌮
Kyle you running with me Saturday morning? Doing 7 miles on the Riverside loop, 6:30am start. No excuses.
Ugh 6:30? Dad come on. Can we do 7?
We're doing 6:30. I've got a cath case at 10 and I need to be home and showered before Karen guilts me into brunch.
Fine. Don't drop me on the bridge this time 😤
Em, got court time Sunday at 10am — doubles with Ravi and Chen if you're free. You and me vs. them. Fair warning, Ravi's been insufferable since he took a lesson last month 🎾
Lol yes. Does Dr. Hussain know he's about to lose to a med student?
He does not. That's the point. Wear actual shoes this time, not those sandals you showed up in last spring.
Dad I wore those ONE time 😭 see you Sunday
Mom — finished my Riverwalk run, legs are dead. Emily's flying in Thursday night for the holiday weekend. Karen's already mapped out the whole itinerary, naturally. You coming Friday evening?
Wild horses couldn't stop me. Tell Emily to bring her racket — Kyle's been begging someone to play with him and Jason you know your backhand is not it 😂
Fair. Ravi and his wife are stopping by around 7 too, they just moved 10 min from us. Should be a good group. Plan on 6, I'll throw something on the grill.
Perfect. I'll bring the peach cobbler Karen likes. Give Emily a hug from me when she lands. 🍑 See you Friday sweetheart.
Ravi — you still on for Saturday? Karen's making her lamb tagine, we've got room at the table if Priya's free. Post-rounds, so probably 7pm at our place in Ponte Vedra.
We're in. Priya's been asking about Karen's recipe for months. Should I bring anything?
Just wine. And if you can pull the Mosaic trial data for Monday's cath lab meeting beforehand I'll owe you a second bottle. Chen's asking questions I don't love.
Already flagged it. The LVEF cutoff in the secondary endpoint is going to be a problem — we should talk before she sees it. See you Saturday.
Sarah — just pulled Kyle's echo from this morning. Structurally clean, but his resting HR is sitting at 102. Before I spiral into dad-mode, am I overthinking this or worth a 24hr Holter?
You're absolutely spiraling into dad-mode 😄 But 102 at rest warrants a look. How old is he now, 16? Any symptoms — palpitations, pre-syncope, fatigue with exertion?
Just turned 17. No syncope, but he did mention feeling 'weird' during tennis last week. That's what started this whole thing.

Order the Holter. If it's clean, you get to stop being his cardiologist and go back to just being his dad. Jacksonville heat plus tennis plus teenage hydration habits — probably sinus tach, but rule it out.
Amanda, covering for Ravi Thursday morning? He's got the cath lab at 8 but I need someone to see his 7:15 consult — 62yo with unstable angina. Should be straightforward but can't leave him hanging.
Ugh, I'm at Coastal's admin meeting until 8:30. Can Chen grab it? She was asking about more consult exposure anyway.
Already texted her — she's in. Good call. I owe you one.
You owe me nothing, but I'm collecting on court time in Jacksonville one of these days. I hear you actually play tennis 😂
Ran the Ponte Vedra loop this morning and my knee started barking around mile 4. You still seeing that sports med guy in Gainesville? Worth a call or am I being dramatic?
Dude you're a cardiologist, you're ALWAYS dramatic about everything except your actual heart lol. Yes — Dr. Patel, I'll text you his number.
Ha. Fair. Ravi keeps telling me to switch to cycling but I'm not ready to give up the miles yet. Send Patel's info when you get a chance.
Just texted it. Tell him your brother sent you, he'll fit you in fast. And maybe listen to Ravi for once 😂
Jason, saw your poster abstract got accepted for TCT — stent-in-stent CTO recanalization series from the Coastal practice. Nice work. You presenting yourself or sending Chen?
Presenting it myself. Sarah's covering the cath lab that week. Ravi's already threatening to liveblog my Q&A from the floor.
Ha. Tell Hussain he owes you one after you covered his STEMI call on the 4th. You running the Ponte Vedra half again this fall or just the 10K?
Half. Training's already underway — five days a week. Karen thinks I've lost my mind but the miles are nonnegotiable. See you at the interventional roundtable Thursday.

Jason, caught your talk on TAVI vs SAVR selection criteria at the Jacksonville Cardiology Roundtable — your point on frailty scoring was solid. Can we grab coffee Friday to dig into some borderline cases I've got?
Friday's blocked but Thursday works. Bring the echo reports and BNP trends, makes it easier to think through. Who's performing the procedures if we go TAVI?
Coastal Vascular, so Ravi would scrub in. Three patients, all STS intermediate. One's got significant renal function questions that complicate the risk calc.
That triples the conversation. Let's say Thursday 7am before cases start. I'll pull current ACC/AHA guidelines on CKD-TAVI outcomes. Should be a good one.
Tom — did Emily's 529 contribution post before the June 30 cutoff? Wanted to hit the FL prepaid cap before Q3.
Just confirmed — posted 6/28. You're good. I'll send the updated statement EOD.
Perfect. Also need to loop you in on the new equipment lease at Coastal Cardiology. Cath lab upgrade, signing next week.
On it. Send me the terms when you have them and I'll run the tax treatment before you sign.

Lisa — you catch that new EMPEROR-Reduced substudy on SGLT2 in ischemic vs non-ischemic? Curious if it changes how you're dosing empagliflozin post-revasc. I've got 3 patients from last week's cath list I'm reconsidering.
Just read it this morning. Honestly the ischemic subgroup data is cleaner than I expected. Who are you wavering on — EF < 35 or borderline?
Two with EF 30-33 post-CABG, one fresh stent from Tuesday. Ravi thinks treat them all, but I want a second set of eyes before clinic Thursday. Coffee at Coastal before 8?
I'm in. 7:30, I'll bring the full supplementary tables. Ravi's not wrong but the CKD overlap in that cohort muddies it — worth a closer look before you commit.

Hey Jason — saw you finishing up a run on San Marco Blvd this morning. Still doing the early miles before rounds? Also need to confirm you're due for your 6-month cleaning, been chasing you since February 😄
Will, that was me. 5:30am, only way it happens before the cath lab opens. February, really? Let's do it — what does your Thursday morning look like?
We've got 7:15am open this Thursday. Light day so we won't rush you out. Karen mentioned your schedule's been brutal lately.
Thursday 7:15 works. Block it. Karen's right but I've got a partner meeting with Ravi that afternoon so at least the day ends on a high note. See you then.
Mrs. Henderson — saw your car in the driveway. Heads up, Kyle left his tennis racket bag on your porch by accident after hitting with his friend Saturday. He'll grab it tonight after school.
Oh no worries at all Jason! It's been sitting here, I figured it was Kyle's. Tell him anytime. How are things going at the hospital?
Busy week — had a complex stenting case Tuesday that ran long. Karen's been holding down the fort. Really appreciate you keeping an eye on the bag, we'll get it off your porch tonight.
Of course! You all work so hard. Tell Karen I said hi, and maybe we can catch up soon. I keep meaning to ask her about that new place on San Marco she mentioned! 😊
Torres, you scrubbing in on the Impella case Thursday or is Ravi taking it? Pt's a 58yo with a LVEF of 15%, cardiogenic shock — want someone sharp on backup.
I'm free after 2pm. Ravi's got cath lab til 4 so I can cover. You doing the axillary or femoral approach?
Femoral. Anatomy's clean per CT. Appreciate it — Karen's got Emily's recital Thursday night so I need to wrap by 6 or I'm a dead man 😂
Ha. Understood. I'll be there by 1:30, we'll have you home before curtain call. Page me if anything changes on the case.
Jason, did you see Ravi's email about the TAVI case Thursday? He's asking if you can scrub in for the valve sizing — patient's anatomy is tricky and he wants your eyes on the CT before we proceed.
Yeah just read it. I can pull up the CTs tonight after my run, send Ravi a note by 9pm. Femoral access looks borderline from the prelim images but need the full stack.
Perfect. Also Sarah flagged she may not make the 7am cath lab start Friday — covering a late call. Can you lead the team brief if she's not in?
Done. I'll be there at 6:45. Tell Sarah not to stress it, just have the heparin protocol and sheath sizes ready in the chart before she signs off.
Jason, you still doing the Ponte Vedra 10K Saturday? Saw your name on the entry list.
Yeah, Karen talked me into it. Haven't pushed past 7 miles in two weeks — cath lab's been brutal. Probably suffer through miles 8-10.
Ha. I'll be at mile 9 with a defib just in case. Hussain coming too?
Ravi's in. He'll PR and never let us forget it. Meet at TPC south lot at 6:15?
Rebecca — heads up, I'm pulling Ravi into the hybrid TAVR case Thursday. Mitral anatomy's trickier than the CT suggested. You still good to scrub in?
Absolutely. Saw the echo report this morning — agree, that subvalvular apparatus is going to be fun. What time are we wheels up?
7am. Perez scheduled it first block so we have the whole morning. Bring coffee.
Done. I'll review the 3D reconstruction tonight. See you at six-thirty for the walkthrough.
Hey Jason — how's the week been? You mentioned last session you were feeling stretched thin between Kyle's lacrosse playoffs and the cath lab backlog.
Honestly rough. Lost a patient Tuesday post-TAVR, complications we didn't see coming. Ravi and I debriefed but it's still sitting with me.
That kind of loss doesn't just clock out. Are you getting your runs in at least? You said the St. Johns River route helps you reset.
Three times this week, so that's something. Helps until it doesn't. Probably need to talk through Tuesday properly — can we use most of Thursday's hour for that?

Pulled a bifurcation PCI on a 58yo this morning — true Medina 1,1,1. Went provisional, kissed the balloons, patient's absolutely fine. Reminded me of that argument we had at the Jax AHA dinner last year.
Ha. Told you provisional beats two-stent for that anatomy nine times out of ten. What was your door-to-balloon?
47 min. Total case under an hour. Ravi scrubbed with me — he's getting genuinely good on bifurcations. Don't tell him I said that.
Nice. You still on for Deerwood courts Thursday? I need a win after you bageled me last week. My backhand is apparently decorative.
